zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Molyneux於1430年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，她的父親Richard Molyneux34歲，母親Joan Haydock44歲。她於1447年與Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德爾文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年在愛爾蘭享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Molyneux于1430年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，她的父亲Richard Molyneux34岁，母亲Joan Haydock44岁。她于1447年与Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德爾文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年在爱尔兰享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Molyneux was born in 1430, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Molyneux, was 34 and her mother, Joan Haydock, was 44. She married Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston in 1447, in Delvin, County Westmeath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1503, in Ireland, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Molyneux est née en 1430, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Haydock, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston en 1447, à Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1503, à Irlande, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Molyneux 1430 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Molyneux 34 und ihre Mutter Joan Haydock 44. Sie hat 1447 in Delvin, County Westmeath, Irland Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1503 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Molyneux è nata il nel 1430 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard Molyneux, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan Haydock, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston nel 1447, nel Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1503, nel Irlanda, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Molyneuxが1430年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは34歳，母Joan Haydockは44歳であった。1447年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスデルヴィンでRobert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年にアイルランドで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Molyneux(이)가 1430년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Haydock(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1447년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 델빈에서 Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 아일랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Molyneux nasceu em 1430, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haydock, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston em 1447, em Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1503, em Irlanda, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Molyneux родилась в 1430 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Haydock, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston в 1447 г. в местности дельвин, коунти вестмит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1503 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Molyneux nació en 1430, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Molyneux, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Haydock, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston en 1447, en Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1503, en Irlanda, a la edad de 73 años.
